title: andropogon sorghum subsp. exiguus
intro: Andropogon sorghum subsp. exiguus, also known as a type of sorghum grass, is a plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties, among others. The health benefits of Andropogon sorghum subsp. exiguus include its ability to help manage diabetes, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce oxidative stress, all of which contribute to overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
